text: Garenoxacin mesylate is a quinolone antibiotic prescribed for chronic bronchitis, sinusitis, pneumonia, intra-abdominal infections, and others. Garenoxacin blocks the action of enzymes that are necessary for the bacteria to make DNA. When should garenoxacin mesylate not be taken?
